ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #987654321 has Shipped
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon! We are pleased to inform you that your order #987654321 has been shipped.

Order Details:
- Item: Kindle Paperwhite – 8GB – Black
- Quantity: 1
- Total Paid: ₹1,299.00 (incl. GST)
- Shipping Address: 12, Laxmi Nagar, New Delhi, 110001
- Shipping Method: Amazon Prime – 1 day delivery

You can track your shipment using the following link: <URL>

If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to reply to this email or call our customer support.

Thank you for choosing Amazon. Happy reading!

Best Regards,
Amazon Customer Service

spam.subject: URGENT: Immediate Action Required – Ticket #IT-987654 – Account Compromised
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected suspicious activity on your corporate account. A ticket has been created (Ticket ID: IT-987654). Please verify your credentials within 24 hours to avoid suspension.

Steps to verify:
1. Click on the following link: <URL>
2. Enter your employee ID and password.
3. Complete the captcha.

If you ignore this, your account will be blocked.

Kripya jaldi se verify karein.

Thank you,
IT Support Team
